title: Jump Movement
description: Move control that causes the mob to jump as it moves with a specified delay between jumps.

jump_delay.title: Jump Delay
jump_delay.description:
Delay in seconds after landing when using the slime move control. Can be a single number, an array [min, max], or an object with range_min and range_max.

Sample values:
• sulfur_cube: [0.5,1.5]
• sulfur_cube: [0.16,0.5]

max_turn.title: Max Turn
max_turn.description: The maximum number in degrees the mob can turn per tick.
